# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
|---------|--------------------|
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in YOZ-Ticaret, please report it to us privately before disclosing it publicly.

### How to Report

- Email: alperencolgecen@gmail.com
- Subject: [SECURITY] - Brief description of the vulnerability

### What to Include

- Detailed description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- Potential impact of the vulnerability
- Any proof-of-concept code or screenshots (if applicable)

### Response Time

- We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours
- We will provide a detailed response within 7 days
- We will aim to release a patch within 14 days of confirmation

### Disclosure Policy

- We will coordinate with you to determine a disclosure timeline
- We will credit you in the security advisory (with your permission)
- We will not disclose your personal information without your consent

## Security Best Practices

### For Users

- Keep your software updated to the latest version
- Use strong, unique passwords
- Enable two-factor authentication when available
- Regular backup of your data

### For Developers

- Validate all user inputs
- Use prepared statements for database queries
- Implement proper authentication and authorization
- Keep dependencies updated
- Follow secure coding practices

## Security Features

YOZ-Ticaret includes several security features:

- Password hashing with bcrypt
- SQL injection protection
- XSS protection
- CSRF protection
- Secure session management
- Input validation and sanitization

## Security Updates

Security updates will be announced through:

- GitHub releases
- Security advisories
- Email notifications (for registered users)

## Responsible Disclosure Program

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will:

- Work with you to understand and fix the vulnerability
- Credit you in our security advisories
- Consider you for our security hall of fame

Thank you for helping keep YOZ-Ticaret safe and secure!
